metadata.description: Backlog management toolkit for Claude Code — ticket creation, refinement, implementation with adaptive pipeline, audit, benchmark, and ACE-inspired self-improvement.

plugins.name: backlog-toolkit
plugins.description: Stack-agnostic backlog management: init, ticket, refinement, implementer (v10.0), sentinel, audit (v2.0), benchmark, reflect. Script delegation, Agent Teams, 3-gate pipeline, Sonnet for all code tasks.
